description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a long neck and a narrow mouth, topped with a dark cap. The bottle features a prominent circular label on the front, displaying a shield-like emblem and the text 'EAGLE-MOCK' in a bold, serif font, along with additional smaller text beneath. The label is primarily brown and beige, matching the overall color scheme of the bottle. The neck of the bottle is also wrapped with a matching label, providing a cohesive branded appearance. The surface of the bottle appears smooth and glossy, typical of glass beverage containers. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle is likely empty or filled with air, as no liquid is clearly visible.
description: A brown glass bottle with a long neck, dark cap, and a prominent circular label featuring a shield emblem and 'EAGLE-MOCK' branding. The bottle has a smooth, glossy surface and a cohesive brown and beige color scheme.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, showing the curved body and partial label details, with the cap and neck label visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full circular label with the shield emblem and 'EAGLE-MOCK' text clearly visible, as well as the neck label.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, showing the opposite side of the bottle with partial label visibility and the cap.
description_view_3: A second front view, nearly identical to view 1, with the full label and branding clearly visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Circular label on the front with a shield emblem and the text 'EAGLE-MOCK' in beige and brown, plus a matching neck label.
